name: Blockchain-Enabled-Adversarial-Threat-Intelligence
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get dist-upgrade -y && sudo apt-get install -y git-lfs && if ! command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get install -y nodejs npm; fi && npm install -g npm@latest && npm install -g ganache@latest && python -m pip install --upgrade 'pip>=24.2' setuptools wheel && pip install -r requirements.txt
